query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `kpi_periods` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `periodType` enum('daily','weekly','monthly') NOT NULL,
  `periodStart` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `periodEnd` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `periodLabel` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `kpi_periods_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `team_member_kpis` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `teamMemberId` int NOT NULL,
  `periodId` int NOT NULL,
  `roleType` enum('am','lm','lg_cold_caller','lg_sms') NOT NULL,
  `metric1` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `metric1Label` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Metric 1',
  `metric2` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `metric2Label` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Metric 2',
  `metric3` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `metric3Label` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Metric 3',
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `team_member_kpis_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `campaign_kpis` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `periodId` int NOT NULL,
  `channel` enum('cold_calls','sms','forms','ppl','jv','ppc','postcards','referrals') NOT NULL,
  `spent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `volume` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `leads` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `offers` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `contracts` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `dealsCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `revenue` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `campaign_kpis_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `kpi_deals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `periodId` int,
  `propertyAddress` text NOT NULL,
  `sellerName` varchar(255),
  `acquisitionManagerId` int,
  `leadManagerId` int,
  `leadSource` enum('cold_calls','sms','forms','ppl','jv','ppc','postcards','referrals'),
  `contractPrice` int DEFAULT 0,
  `estimatedArv` int DEFAULT 0,
  `estimatedRepairs` int DEFAULT 0,
  `assignmentFee` int DEFAULT 0,
  `status` enum('under_contract','due_diligence','closed','fell_through') DEFAULT 'under_contract',
  `contractDate` timestamp,
  `closingDate` timestamp,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `kpi_deals_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `kpi_goals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `periodId` int,
  `goalType` enum('campaign','team_member') NOT NULL,
  `channel` enum('cold_calls','sms','forms','ppl','jv','ppc','postcards','referrals','total'),
  `teamMemberId` int,
  `metricName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `targetValue` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `kpi_goals_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
